title: OpenChronology Schema Registry
description: Root index for the OpenChronology JSON Schema registry. Lists all published and pre-release spec versions with their schema base URLs. Implementers and tools may fetch this file to discover available versions and locate schemas for a given spec version.

versions.notes: First published schema set. Complete pre-release draft covering all file types in the v0.2 spec. Not yet recommended for production use — breaking changes possible before 1.0.

versioning_policy.summary: Same MAJOR version = compatible. Parsers MUST ignore unknown fields (enabling automatic MINOR version compatibility). MAJOR version changes require published migration guides and conversion tools.
versioning_policy.compatibility: A parser conformant to vX.Y is compatible with all vX.Z files where Z >= Y, provided unknown fields are ignored per spec §2.3.
